data.title: Greenberg Traurig helps Betterware acquire Tupperware Latin America for $250 million.NYSE:BWMX involved.
data.description: In Miami on January 26, 2026, the renowned law firm Greenberg Traurig, P.A. aided Betterware de México, S.A.P.I. de C.V. (NYSE: BWMX), the holding company of Betterware and Jafra (BeFra), in finalizing a deal to purchase Tupperware's operational assets in Latin America. This agreement marks a significant move in the industry.

data.title: US Foods workers in Indiana to hold practice picket with over 200 participants ahead of contract expiration.
data.description: Ahead of their upcoming contract expiration, more than 200 drivers and warehouse workers at US Foods in Indiana are set to hold a practice picket at 4:30 p.m. on Tuesday, Jan. 27. The demonstration is intended to showcase the Teamsters solidarity of Local 135 members.

data.title: Insurance expert Dan Simmons from Hastings, MI clarifies insurance coverage mistakes in Michigan, emphasizing common misunderstandings around coverage.
data.description: In Hastings, Michigan on January 26, 2026, a recent article by HelloNation sheds light on the lack of understanding among Michigan homeowners and drivers regarding how their insurance policies align in times of trouble. This issue is prevalent due to misconceptions surrounding coverage details. The article aims to clarify these misunderstandings and educate readers on the intricacies of insurance policies.

data.title: Bitcoin stable at $88,000 amid preference for metals. 129,968 traders liquidated in 24 hours for $569.98 million. Binance Founder bullish.
data.description: Bitcoin is currently stable at around $88,000 amid ongoing institutional preference for metals over cryptocurrencies. The current cryptocurrency prices are as follows: Bitcoin (BTC) at $88,237.22, Ethereum (ETH) at $2,929.87, Solana (SOL) at $124.53, XRP at $1.91, Dogecoin (DOGE) at $0.1226, and Shiba Inu (SHIB) at $0.057755. Recent data from Coinglass indicates that 129,968 traders were liquidated in the past 24 hours, resulting in losses totaling $569.98 million. Among the top gainers in the last 24 hours are Pump.fun, River, and Hyperliquid. Binance Founder Changpeng Zhao continues to express optimism for 2026, predicting a bullish cycle where Bitcoin "will probably break" strategy. Additionally, a notable purchase of 2,932 Bitcoin for $264 million has been made. For more details, the complete story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: KBRA assigns preliminary ratings to 56 classes of mortgage-backed notes in PMT Loan Trust 2026-CNF1, with $302.4 million balance.
data.description: In New York, KBRA has assigned preliminary ratings to 56 classes of mortgage-backed notes from PMT Loan Trust 2026-CNF1, a prime RMBS transaction sponsored by PennyMac Corp. This trust comprises 576 conforming mortgage loans with a total stated principal balance of around $302.4 million as of January 1, 2026. PennyMac, an indirect wholly-owned subsidiary of PennyMac Mortgage Investment Trust, is the sponsor of this transaction.

data.title: Dow Jones rises; Trump threatens new tariffs on Canada. Tesla stock drops; CoreWeave surges. Gold hits milestone.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced an increase despite President Trump's announcement of potential new tariffs on Canada. While Tesla stock declined, CoreWeave saw a significant jump in its value. In other news, the price of gold surpassed a significant milestone, and a rare earth company experienced a surge in its stock price due to a specific development. This news was covered live under the title "Stock Market Today: Dow Rises As Gold Clears A Milestone; Rare Earth Play Surges On This News."

data.title: HPE partners with 2degrees in New Zealand for AI innovation on private cloud platform, with focus on data sovereignty.
data.description: In Auckland, New Zealand, HPE (NYSE: HPE) has revealed a key partnership with 2degrees, a prominent telecommunications and technology company in the region. This collaboration aims to accelerate AI-driven progress by establishing a specialized private AI platform using HPE Private Cloud AI. The innovative solution will streamline and update 2degrees’ technology infrastructure, establishing a sovereign, cohesive, and adaptable platform that enables the company to offer more nimble and scalable solutions.

data.title: Human Development Fund and Palmer Family Foundation launch "Roots of Recovery" program in Jamaica to revitalize agriculture sector post hurricane.
data.description: In Canton, Michigan, the Human Development Fund (HDF) has recently unveiled their new relief project named "Roots of Recovery" on January 26, 2026. This initiative aims to rejuvenate Jamaica's agricultural industry after significant damage caused by recent events.

data.title: VanEck introduces new crypto ETF for AVAX, amid pending approval for other Avalanche ETFs, providing spot exposure for investors.
data.description: The recently introduced fund provides exchange-traded access to AVAX, amidst ongoing regulatory evaluation of other proposed Avalanche ETFs.
